tools.name: hires_list_candidates
tools.description: List candidates with optional filters. Supports filtering by job, stage, email, name, LinkedIn, and date ranges. Returns paginated results. Recommended size <= 10: candidate payloads include the full profile answers array and can be large; if the response exceeds the budget the tool returns isError:

tools.name: hires_create_candidate
tools.description: Create a new candidate profile. Optionally link to a job/stage and attach the candidate's resume as extracted text. Used for imports, inbound forms, and enrichment workflows. When the user provides an attached resume (PDF/DOCX/etc.), parse the file content yourself from the chat context — LLMs nativ

tools.name: hires_get_candidate
tools.description: Get full candidate data including application summaries by candidate ID or alias.

tools.name: hires_update_candidate
tools.description: Update candidate fields, profile answers, and optional resume text. Used for bi-directional sync from ATS, CRM, sourcing, or enrichment tools. When the user provides an attached resume, parse it yourself from chat context and pass via resume_text — do not inline binary data.

tools.name: hires_delete_candidate
tools.description: Permanently delete a candidate by ID or alias.

tools.name: hires_list_candidate_tags
tools.description: List all tags assigned to a candidate. Useful for segmentation and audience-based automations.

tools.name: hires_add_candidate_tags
tools.description: Add one or more tags to a candidate. Used for campaign tagging, qualification labels, and source attribution.

tools.name: hires_remove_candidate_tag
tools.description: Remove a specific tag from a candidate.

tools.name: hires_batch_add_tags
tools.description: Add tags to multiple candidates in one request (max 100). Returns per-item results with partial success support.

tools.name: hires_batch_remove_tags
tools.description: Remove tags from multiple candidates in one request (max 100). Returns per-item results with partial success support.

tools.name: hires_list_candidate_files
tools.description: List all files attached to a candidate (resumes and other documents). Each entry has uuid, absolute download url (use Bearer auth), relative_time, file metadata (orig_file_name, file_ext, file_type/MIME, readable_size), and type (resume/other). Default response is compact; avoid include=text_content

tools.name: hires_upload_candidate_file
tools.description: Upload a file for a candidate using a base64 payload. Used for portfolio uploads and document attachment. WARNING: host function-call serializers (both OpenAI and Anthropic) truncate tool arguments above ~20KB, so binary files larger than that will arrive corrupted. For resumes specifically, prefer

tools.name: hires_get_candidate_resume
tools.description: Get the primary resume for a candidate. Returns uuid, absolute download url (use Bearer auth), relative_time, file metadata, type. Use include='text_content' to also get the parsed plain-text content in a `text` field without downloading the file.

tools.name: hires_list_candidate_activities
tools.description: List timeline activities for a candidate (comments, stage moves, AI responses, etc.). Supports filtering by event type. Recommended size <= 10: copilot responses and call transcriptions can be large per event; if the response exceeds the budget the tool returns isError:true with error_code=response_

tools.name: hires_disqualify_candidate
tools.description: Disqualify a candidate from all active applications. Optionally provide rejection reason IDs. Returns affected application IDs.

tools.name: hires_list_candidate_interviews
tools.description: List all interviews for a candidate across all applications. Useful for timeline views and scheduling conflict detection.

tools.name: hires_list_candidate_messages
tools.description: List email and messaging history for a candidate. Use is_scheduled=1 to filter only pending scheduled messages. Recommended size <= 10: messages include full HTML body; if the response exceeds the budget the tool returns isError:true with error_code=response_too_large and retry hints.

tools.name: hires_send_candidate_message
tools.description: Schedule an email message to a candidate. If scheduled_at is omitted, the message is scheduled for 15 minutes after creation.

tools.name: hires_list_applications
tools.description: List applications across all accessible jobs. Supports filtering by candidate, job, stage, status, AI score range, and date ranges. Use for pipeline analytics, sync jobs, and ATS dashboards. Avoid include=candidate or include=cv.text on large pages (each embeds heavy nested data); if the response ex

tools.name: hires_create_application
tools.description: Create an application by linking an existing candidate to a job. Use for sourcing workflows and manual application ingestion. The candidate must already exist.

tools.name: hires_get_application
tools.description: Get full application details including stage, status, and rejection context. Recommended before mutating stage transitions.

tools.name: hires_update_application
tools.description: Update application fields such as stage, disqualification flag, and CV. For explicit stage transitions prefer hires_move_application or hires_advance_application.

tools.name: hires_delete_application
tools.description: Permanently delete an application. This removes it from all list and view queries.

tools.name: hires_move_application
tools.description: Moves an application to a specific pipeline stage for explicit stage transitions in workflow orchestration. Requires the target stage_id (available via the job's pipeline_stages).

tools.name: hires_advance_application
tools.description: Advance an application to the next pipeline stage according to workflow order. No stage_id needed -- the system determines the next stage automatically. **Always pass `include=candidate,job`** when surfacing results in the widget — without it, the confirmation card can only show candidate/job IDs an

tools.name: hires_hire_application
tools.description: Mark an application as hired. This is the finalization step in a hiring workflow. The application status changes to 'hired' and hired_at is set.

tools.name: hires_reject_application
tools.description: Reject an application with an optional rejection reason. Use GET /taxonomy/rejection-reasons to list available reason IDs. Set suppress_notification to skip the rejection email.

tools.name: hires_unreject_application
tools.description: Undo a rejection and reopen a previously rejected application. The status returns to active and rejected_at is cleared.

tools.name: hires_transfer_application
tools.description: Transfer an application to another job. A new application is created on the target job. Optionally specify a stage on the target job's pipeline.

tools.name: hires_get_ai_score
tools.description: Get the structured AI score for an application, including per-criterion scores, justifications, and follow-up questions. Returns null score if the application has not been AI-scored.

tools.name: hires_list_application_stage_history
tools.description: Get the full chronological stage transition history for an application, including the initial assignment. Each entry has from_stage_id/name, to_stage_id/name, moved_at (Unix seconds), moved_by_type (system, user, automation), moved_by_user_id, and source (what caused the transition, e.g. 'apply:inde

tools.name: hires_list_application_attachments
tools.description: List all file attachments linked to an application (resumes, cover letters, documents). Returns file metadata and download URLs.

tools.name: hires_upload_application_attachment
tools.description: Upload a file attachment to an application. Provide the file as base64-encoded data. Commonly used for signed documents and interviewer artifacts.

tools.name: hires_list_application_evaluations
tools.description: List all filled evaluation forms for an application. Each evaluation includes the evaluator, summary score (strong-yes to strong-no), and summary text.

tools.name: hires_create_interview
tools.description: Schedule a new interview for an application. Provide start/end times as Unix timestamps and a list of interviewer user IDs. Location is resolved to an existing record or created automatically.

tools.name: hires_batch_move_applications
tools.description: Move multiple applications to a pipeline stage in one request. Returns per-item results with partial success support. Max 100 application IDs per request.

tools.name: hires_batch_reject_applications
tools.description: Reject multiple applications in one request with an optional rejection reason. Returns per-item results with partial success support. Max 100 application IDs per request.

tools.name: hires_list_jobs
tools.description: List jobs with optional filters by status, date range, department, or search query. Returns paginated results. Use for career-site sync, reporting, and external system indexing. Recommended size <= 10: full job payloads include description HTML and can be large; if the response exceeds the budget th

tools.name: hires_create_job
tools.description: Create a job with taxonomy, location, salary, and workflow configuration. Primary endpoint for programmatic job publishing. Required fields: status, title, description, location_city, location_country.

tools.name: hires_get_job
tools.description: Get full details of a job by ID or alias. Use `include` to load related workflow, hiring team, or pipeline stages data.

tools.name: hires_update_job
tools.description: Update mutable job attributes. Only send fields you want to change. Preserves domain-level validation rules.

tools.name: hires_delete_job
tools.description: Delete a job. Use to align archived/removed positions across integrated platforms.

tools.name: hires_set_job_status
tools.description: Change job status via dedicated endpoint. Recommended for publish/unpublish/archive transitions and status automation workflows.

tools.name: hires_list_job_boards
tools.description: Get current board publication state for a specific job. Returns which job boards the job is published to. Useful for distribution dashboards and posting audits.

tools.name: hires_publish_to_job_board
tools.description: Activate selected job boards for a job. Sets boards to activation queue state. Use for controlled multi-board publishing workflows.

tools.name: hires_remove_from_job_board
tools.description: Deactivate selected board publications for a job. Stops the job from being listed on specified boards.

tools.name: hires_batch_job_boards
tools.description: Get board publication states for multiple jobs in one request. Optimized for batch monitoring and management UIs.

tools.name: hires_batch_publish_to_boards
tools.description: Activate board publication for multiple jobs in one request. Use for bulk job distribution workflows.

tools.name: hires_batch_remove_from_boards
tools.description: Deactivate board publication for multiple jobs in one request. Use for bulk depublishing workflows.

tools.name: hires_list_hiring_team
tools.description: List users currently assigned to a job's hiring team. Useful for notification routing and collaboration tooling.

tools.name: hires_add_hiring_team_member
tools.description: Add a company member to the job's hiring team. Use in workflow setup and ownership automation.

tools.name: hires_list_job_webhooks
tools.description: List webhooks configured for job-level events. Use to audit subscriptions and deployment state.

tools.name: hires_create_job_webhook
tools.description: Register a webhook URL for job-related events. Core step for outbound integration setup. URL must be HTTPS. Returns a signing_secret once — store it to verify the x-hires-signature-v2 header on incoming deliveries.

tools.name: hires_delete_job_webhook
tools.description: Delete a job webhook subscription by ID. Use for cleanup, rotation, and endpoint migration.

tools.name: hires_rotate_job_webhook_secret
tools.description: Rotate a job webhook's signing secret (zero-downtime). Returns the new signing_secret once; the previous secret stays valid for a grace window so deliveries are not dropped while you switch over.

tools.name: hires_list_messages
tools.description: List messages sent or scheduled from a specific mail account. Returns outbound messages only (sent and scheduled), not received. Useful for monitoring cold outreach campaigns — check pending queue, delivery history, and plan next sends. Recommended size <= 10: messages include full HTML body; if the

tools.name: hires_get_message
tools.description: Get a scheduled message by ID. Returns scheduler-backed message details including sender account, schedule timestamps, and cancelability.

tools.name: hires_update_message
tools.description: Fully update (replace) a scheduled message before send time. All required fields must be provided.

tools.name: hires_patch_message
tools.description: Partially update a scheduled message before send time. Only provided fields are changed.

tools.name: hires_delete_message
tools.description: Cancel a scheduled message before it is processed by the mailbox scheduler.

tools.name: hires_batch_create_messages
tools.description: Create up to 100 scheduled messages in one request. Each item specifies its own candidate_id and message payload. Items are processed independently -- one failure does not stop others. Per-candidate RBAC is enforced for each item.

tools.name: hires_get_notification_message
tools.description: Get a notification email message (e.g. rejection email) by ID. Returns subject, body, sender, recipient, and schedule metadata. Use candidate messages list to discover notification message IDs.

tools.name: hires_update_notification_message
tools.description: Update a scheduled notification email before it is sent. Change subject, body, and optionally reschedule the send time. Only scheduled (not yet sent) messages can be updated.

tools.name: hires_delete_notification_message
tools.description: Cancel a scheduled notification email before it is sent. Already sent messages cannot be canceled.

tools.name: hires_cancel_all_notification_messages
tools.description: Cancel all scheduled notification emails for a candidate. Already sent notifications are not affected. Returns success even if no scheduled notifications exist.

tools.name: hires_list_interviews
tools.description: List interviews with optional filters by job, application, candidate, interviewer, date, or timestamps for incremental sync. Returns paginated results. **Always pass `include=candidate`** when surfacing results in the agenda widget — without it, the widget can only show candidate IDs and cannot link

tools.name: hires_get_interview
tools.description: Get full details of a specific interview by ID. Use `include` to embed related candidate, application, or job data.

tools.name: hires_list_notes
tools.description: List notes by candidate. Returns paginated discussion notes for a candidate. Use for shared recruiter context and timeline synchronization. Notes can contain long free-form text; if the response exceeds the budget the tool returns isError:true with error_code=response_too_large and retry hints.

tools.name: hires_create_note
tools.description: Create a discussion note for a candidate. Supports visibility control (all or private) and @mentions with email notifications. **Always pass `include=candidate`** when surfacing results in the widget — without it, the confirmation card can only show the candidate ID and cannot link to their backoffi

tools.name: hires_get_note
tools.description: Get a single note with author and visibility metadata. Use include=user to load author details.

tools.name: hires_update_note
tools.description: Update note body and/or visibility without creating a new timeline item. Use for corrections and moderation workflows.

tools.name: hires_delete_note
tools.description: Delete a note. Use for moderation policies and data cleanup operations.

tools.name: hires_get_evaluation
tools.description: Get a filled evaluation form with all answers. Returns evaluator info, summary score, summary text, and individual question answers. Use for detailed review of evaluator feedback on a candidate application.

tools.name: hires_list_forms
tools.description: List application forms (paginated). Returns forms with their questions for the target company. Recommended size <= 10: each form embeds its full question list; if the response exceeds the budget the tool returns isError:true with error_code=response_too_large and retry hints.

tools.name: hires_create_form
tools.description: Create a new application form, optionally attaching existing questions by ID.

tools.name: hires_get_form
tools.description: Get form details including all questions with their statuses.

tools.name: hires_update_form
tools.description: Update form name and question composition.

tools.name: hires_delete_form
tools.description: Delete an application form.

tools.name: hires_update_form_question
tools.description: Update the status (required/optional/hidden) of a question inside a form.

tools.name: hires_list_email_templates
tools.description: List email templates for the target company. Returns paginated results with template name, subject, and body. Recommended size <= 10: templates include the full HTML body; if the response exceeds the budget the tool returns isError:true with error_code=response_too_large and retry hints — reduce siz

tools.name: hires_create_email_template
tools.description: Create a new email template with name, subject, and body. Subject and body support placeholders like {{first_name}}, {{job_title}}. To embed placeholders: 1) GET /template-placeholders to list them, 2) POST /template-placeholders/prepare to get the HTML tag, 3) insert the tag into the body.

tools.name: hires_get_email_template
tools.description: Get full details of a specific email template by ID, including subject and body content.

tools.name: hires_update_email_template
tools.description: Update an existing email template. Only provided fields are overwritten; omitted fields keep their current values. To add placeholders, use the same workflow as creation.

tools.name: hires_delete_email_template
tools.description: Soft-delete an email template. Templates already used in automations will stop being available for new actions.

tools.name: hires_list_nurture_campaigns
tools.description: List nurture campaigns with pagination. Returns campaign summaries including steps.

tools.name: hires_create_nurture_campaign
tools.description: Create a nurture campaign with steps. Steps are executed sequentially; each step has a type (email, sms, voicemail, move_to_next_stage, assign_tag, assign_task) with type-specific fields. Optionally bind to a workflow stage.

tools.name: hires_get_nurture_campaign
tools.description: Get a single nurture campaign by ID with all steps and configuration details.

tools.name: hires_update_nurture_campaign
tools.description: Update an existing nurture campaign. Pass all steps -- mark removed steps with is_deleted=true. Existing steps must include their id.

tools.name: hires_delete_nurture_campaign
tools.description: Delete (soft-delete) a nurture campaign. Active campaign executions will be stopped.

tools.name: hires_list_users
tools.description: List users for the target company with role context. Returns paginated results useful for access reviews and hiring-team management.

tools.name: hires_get_user
tools.description: Get a single user by ID within current tenant scope. Use for identity resolution in automation flows. The `default_mail_account_id` field can be used as `from_account_id` when sending emails.

tools.name: hires_list_user_mail_accounts
tools.description: List mail accounts connected to a user. Use to resolve `from_account_id` before creating scheduled emails via POST /candidates/{id}/messages.

tools.name: hires_list_companies
tools.description: List partner-accessible companies with pagination. Use for tenant discovery and management panels.

tools.name: hires_create_company
tools.description: Create a client company (partner tenant) — provisions its public career-site URL (slug) and public branding (logo, name). Typical entrypoint for multi-tenant onboarding.

tools.name: hires_get_company
tools.description: Get company profile and owner metadata. Use before updates or ownership-sensitive actions.

tools.name: hires_update_company
tools.description: Update company profile, owner contact data, and optional logo — changes the tenant's public career-site URL (slug), name, and logo (public branding). Supports partner-operated account management.

tools.name: hires_delete_company
tools.description: Delete (soft-delete) a company — takes its public career site offline. Use for lifecycle control in partner tenancy management.

tools.name: hires_list_company_mail_accounts
tools.description: List all mail accounts for all users in the current company. Use to resolve `from_account_id` before creating scheduled emails.

tools.name: hires_list_company_id_mail_accounts
tools.description: List all mail accounts for all users in a specific company. The company must be accessible (own company or a client).

tools.name: hires_restore_company
tools.description: Restore a previously deleted company and re-enable it for active use — its public career site comes back online. Use for recovery and rollback scenarios.

tools.name: hires_list_webhooks
tools.description: List webhook subscriptions configured at company scope.

tools.name: hires_create_webhook
tools.description: Create a company-scoped webhook subscription. Use for outbound company-level event integrations. Returns a signing_secret once — store it to verify the x-hires-signature-v2 header on incoming deliveries.

tools.name: hires_delete_webhook
tools.description: Delete a company-scoped webhook subscription by ID. Use for endpoint retirement and security rotation.

tools.name: hires_rotate_webhook_secret
tools.description: Rotate a company webhook's signing secret (zero-downtime). Returns the new signing_secret once; the previous secret stays valid for a grace window so deliveries are not dropped while you switch over.

tools.name: hires_list_sources
tools.description: List candidate sources for the company. Use for attribution sync and reporting consistency.

tools.name: hires_list_origins
tools.description: List candidate origin taxonomy values. Use for attribution analytics and source normalization.

tools.name: hires_list_rejection_reasons
tools.description: List configured rejection reasons for the company. Use to validate rejection actions and analytics.

tools.name: hires_list_statuses
tools.description: List job status labels (draft, published, on_hold, closed, archived). Cache to validate job status updates.

tools.name: hires_list_departments
tools.description: List departments for the company. Use for job organization filters and reporting dimensions.

tools.name: hires_list_categories
tools.description: List global job categories. Use for job classification and consistent taxonomy mapping.

tools.name: hires_list_education_levels
tools.description: List education level taxonomy values. Useful for job requirements and structured matching.

tools.name: hires_list_experience_levels
tools.description: List experience level taxonomy values for role seniority modeling.

tools.name: hires_list_employment_types
tools.description: List supported employment types (full-time, part-time, contract, etc.). Use for validation and normalization.

tools.name: hires_list_boards
tools.description: List available publishing boards with metadata. Use for distribution setup and board selection.

tools.name: hires_list_tags
tools.description: List all tags for the company. Returns paginated results. Recommended to cache for fast tagging UX.

tools.name: hires_list_workflows
tools.description: List workflows with embedded stages for the company. Use to build stage-aware integrations and routing rules.

tools.name: hires_list_workflow_stages
tools.description: List pipeline stages filtered by workflow or job. Useful for transition UIs and workflow validation.

tools.name: hires_get_workflow_stages
tools.description: Get stages for a specific workflow by ID. Equivalent to hires_list_workflow_stages with workflow_id filter.

tools.name: hires_list_questions
tools.description: List paginated question catalog for the company.

tools.name: hires_create_question
tools.description: Create a reusable question with optional answer options for dropdown types. Used by forms and questionnaires.

tools.name: hires_get_question
tools.description: Get a question definition including type and options by ID.

tools.name: hires_update_question
tools.description: Update text, type, or options of an existing question definition.

tools.name: hires_delete_question
tools.description: Delete a reusable question from the catalog. Use cautiously when deprecating question banks.

tools.name: hires_list_question_types
tools.description: List available question types supported by the platform. Use to drive dynamic form builders.

tools.name: hires_list_template_placeholders
tools.description: List available placeholders for email templates with pagination. Use `type` to filter by category, `q` to search by label. Discover placeholders here, then use hires_prepare_template_placeholders to get an HTML tag for insertion.

tools.name: hires_prepare_template_placeholders
tools.description: Convert a placeholder reference into an HTML tag for insertion into an email template body.

tools.name: hires_get_billing
tools.description: Get billing/pricing capability flags for the current company. Use before invoking paid-only API behaviors.

tools.name: hires_submit_feedback
tools.description: Submit structured API feedback about missing features, issues, or workflow improvements. Rate limited to 5 requests per hour.

tools.name: hires_download_attachment
tools.description: Download an attachment (resume, candidate file, application file, mail attachment, call recording). Pass the absolute URL returned by another endpoint (e.g. `message.attachments[].url`, `cv.url`, `resume.url`) — it MUST belong to the configured 100Hires API host; other hosts are rejected to avoid le

tools.name: hires_upload_attachment
tools.description: Upload a file and create an attachment. Supported categories: `voicemail` (wav/mp3, max 20 MB, no object_id — returned `uuid` is usable as `attachment_uuid` in nurture voicemail steps); `candidate` (candidate ID); `application` (application ID); `candidate_comment` (comment ID); `job_note` (job-note

tools.name: hires_list_career_jobs
tools.description: List publicly visible jobs for a company career site. Supports filtering by department, employment type, city, and country. Use to power a custom careers page.

tools.name: hires_get_career_job
tools.description: Get full details of a single public job by ID. Returns salary, education level, experience level, and other extended fields. Returns 404 for draft, archived, or internal jobs.

tools.name: hires_submit_career_application
tools.description: Submit a job application on behalf of a candidate. Creates a candidate record and triggers the career-site pipeline automation.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "hires_list_candidate_files" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Anomalously long tool description
findings.detail: Description of "hires_list_applications" is 635 chars, far longer than this server's median (123). Overlong descriptions are a common place to bury instructions.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: hires_list_candidates, hires_list_candidate_files, hires_get_candidate_resume, hires_list_candidate_activities, hires_list_candidate_messages, hires_reject_application, hires_list_application_attachments, hires_list_jobs, hires_list_hiring_team, hires_list_messages, hires_get_message, hires_get_notification_message, hires_get_evaluation, hires_list_email_templates, hires_create_email_template, hires_get_email_template, hires_list_users, hires_get_user, hires_list_user_mail_accounts, hires_list_company_mail_accounts, hires_list_template_placeholders, hires_download_attachment · Private data: hires_list_candidates, hires_create_candidate, hires_list_candidate_files, hires_upload_candidate_file, hires_get_candidate_resume, hires_list_application_stage_history, hires_list_application_attachments, hires_upload_application_attachment, hires_create_interview, hires_list_jobs, hires_rotate_job_webhook_secret, hires_create_note, hires_update_company, hires_rotate_webhook_secret, hires_download_attachment, hires_upload_attachment, hires_submit_career_application · Public sink: hires_list_candidates, hires_upload_candidate_file, hires_list_candidate_messages, hires_send_candidate_message, hires_reject_application, hires_upload_application_attachment, hires_update_job, hires_set_job_status, hires_publish_to_job_board, hires_batch_publish_to_boards, hires_create_job_webhook, hires_delete_job_webhook, hires_rotate_job_webhook_secret, hires_update_message, hires_patch_message,
